tasks.subject: Task 1: Multi-source domain resolution + realistic test fixtures (atomic)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `_resolve_domain_name` helper with 3-source priority (payload → snapshot → tar inference), rewrite the domain+count block in `inspect_archive`, realign `_payload()` test helper with Node.js output, adjust 6 existing tests, add `TestDomainResolution` class with 5 new tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/gcs_archive_audit.py`
- Modify: `tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py`

**Verify:** `cd c:/Users/randr/Documents/Workspaces/RAG-HP-PUB && pytest tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/gcs_archive_audit.py", "tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd c:/Users/randr/Documents/Workspaces/RAG-HP-PUB && pytest tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_resolve_domain_name with 3-source priority", "OK+warning when unresolvable", "ROW_COUNT_MISMATCH preserved", "realistic _payload helper", "5 new TestDomainResolution tests"]}
```
